objective: Add a bits-ui Slider inside `.slider-container` on `src/routes/+page.svelte`: single value 0-3 inclusive, discrete steps, map indices to CSS themes light, stone, twilight, dark; render Thumb and Range only (no Ticks); use `onValueCommit` with a console.log placeholder handler; style using existing `static/styles/` design tokens where practical.

completed_stages.summary: Bootstrapped manifest with objective and set current_agent to planner.
plan.md and acceptance-criteria.md delivered; open questions deferred with Builder defaults per objective (route-local slider, console.log stub, initial index 0).
Home page bits-ui Slider with theme mapping, onValueCommit console stub, token-based styles; build-log recorded.
test-report.md maps ACs to check/lint and manual verification.
PASS_WITH_NOTES: AC-10 manual a11y name verification; AC-13 satisfied after Prettier remediation.
